entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop being evaluated for transgenic resistance to pests

entities.name: CRY IIA
entities.description: A transgenic gene/protein encoded in chickpea lines to provide insect resistance

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: The lepidopteran pest (pod borer) used to test the resistance of chickpea lines

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand or reduce damage caused by Helicoverpa armigera

entities.name: DETACHED LEAF ASSAY
entities.description: An experimental technique used to evaluate pest resistance using separated plant leaves

entities.name: LEAF DAMAGE
entities.description: The extent of tissue loss on leaves caused by pest feeding, used as a measure of resistance

entities.name: LARVAL SURVIVAL
entities.description: The rate of survival of H. armigera larvae when feeding on specific plant lines

entities.name: WEIGHT GAIN
entities.description: The growth rate of H. armigera larvae when feeding on specific plant lines

entities.name: LABORATORY CONDITIONS
entities.description: The controlled environment where larval survival and weight gain were observed

entities.name: BS5A.2(T2) 19-1P2
entities.description: A specific transgenic chickpea line that showed enhanced resistance to H. armigera

entities.name: BS5A.2(T2) 19-2P1
entities.description: A specific transgenic chickpea line that showed enhanced resistance to H. armigera
